name: Room Print
explanation: A convolution reverb that prints your sound into a real, measured acoustic space. A genuine room impulse response is baked into the plugin and convolved with the input in the time domain, so the reverb is the true fingerprint of a physical room rather than an algorithm. Controls: dry/wet Mix, Size (how much of the tail is used), Pre-Delay, Tone (high-frequency damping of the tail) and stereo Width. Impulse response: Adventure Kid 'AK-SROOMS' small-room IR, licensed CC BY 4.0.
